details.pattern: Effect<out A, out E = never, out R = never> — all covariant. Def.execute returns Effect.Effect<ExecuteResult<M>> = Effect<ExecuteResult<M>, never, never>. Tools return Effect<ExecuteResult<M>, never, Services>. Covariance means Services is NOT a subtype of never → TS2345. Fix: change R to any.
details.note: Root cause of 82 TS2345 errors in tool layer
